{"problem_standardized_math":"Assume that \(X\) and \(S\) are diagonal matrices with positive diagonal entries. Show that the coefficient matrix in (14.44a) is symmetric positive definite if and only if \(A\) has full row rank. Does this conclusion still hold if \(D\) is replaced by a diagonal matrix with exactly \(m\) positive diagonal entries and all remaining diagonal entries equal to zero, where \(m\) is the number of rows of \(A\)?"}
